## Type of Change

- [ ] Cross-reference data correction
- [ ] Missing alternative or replacement update
- [ ] Static site or SEO update
- [ ] Documentation or governance update
- [ ] Publishing workflow update

## Engineering Evidence

Include public datasheet, manufacturer, lifecycle, compliance, distributor, or
TrustCompo references that support the change.

## Validation Boundary

- [ ] The change avoids blanket equivalence claims.
- [ ] Remaining package, pinout, electrical, thermal, lifecycle, compliance, and application checks are clear.
- [ ] Links have been checked.
